publish.title: India का समुंदरी किला: Duqm Port और Malacca Trap का जवाब 🌊
publish.description:
हज़ारों मील दूर, India Oman के Duqm Port में एक deep-water किला बना रहा है — जो Indian Ocean के
chokepoint-trap का जवाब है और China की naval expansion के सामने India की ताक़त। पूरी कहानी।

Follow for daily geopolitics, explained in Hinglish. 🌊

Sources: India-Oman Duqm access agreement (2018) + deepening investment · Duqm = deep-water port on
Oman's open Arabian-Sea coast (outside Hormuz) · India countering China's Indian-Ocean naval presence
(String of Pearls / Gwadar) · "unsinkable aircraft carrier" strategic metaphor.

Credits: Footage — Pexels (free commercial) · Music — royalty-free · Maps — Govt-of-India official boundary.
Disclaimer: A geopolitics explainer; strategic framing from public reporting, figures may be revised.
